quotes.author: Socrates
quotes.quote: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.

quotes.author: Einstein
quotes.quote: Imagination is more important than knowledge.

quotes.author: Theodor Roosevelt
quotes.quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.

quotes.author: John Lennon
quotes.quote: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.

quotes.author: Mae West
quotes.quote: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.

quotes.author: Oscar Wilde
quotes.quote: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.

quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson
quotes.quote: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.

quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln
quotes.quote: In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.

quotes.author: Norma Vaughan
quotes.quote: Dream big and dare to fail.

quotes.author: Winston Churchill
quotes.quote: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.

quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt
quotes.quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.

quotes.author: Mark Twain
quotes.quote: Kindness is a language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.

quotes.author: Elbert Hubbard
quotes.quote: A friend is someone who knows all about you and still loves you.
